_publications._publicationTitle: Kinome Profiling of NF1-Related MPNSTs in Response to Kinase Inhibition and Doxorubicin Reveals Therapeutic Vulnerabilities.

_contextSnippet: RAS and AKT pathway inactivation (i.e., ERK1/2, mTOR, S6, and p90RSK) was observed after 4 h of trametinib in the NF1-MET and NF1-P53 tumors
details: Caused RAS and AKT pathway inactivation (ERK1/2, mTOR, S6, p90RSK) after 4h in NF1-MET and NF1-P53 tumors
